title: Subtracting decimals (tenths)
description: Subtract small whole numbers and tenths like 1.6-0.3

hints: There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.

###Place Value

We can think in terms of tenths:

$\begin{align}
&\phantom{=}1.3 - 0.6\\\\
&=13\text{ tenths} - 6\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=7\text{ tenths}\\\\
&=0.7
\end{align}$

###Place value table

Let's line up the numbers by their decimal places. 

Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | -
$\blueE{1}$ | $.$ | $\blueE{3}$
$\maroonD0$ | $.$ | $\maroonD{6}$

Now, let's subtract each place value column.

| Ones | $.$ | Tenths
-| - | - | -
| $\overset{0}{\cancel{\blueE{1}}}$ | $.$ | $\overset{13}{\cancel{\blueE{3}}}$
$-$| $\maroonD{0}$ | $.$ | $\maroonD{6}$
| $\underline{~~~~}$ | $\underline{~~~~}$| $\underline{~~~~}$
| $0$ | $.$| $7$
There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.
